---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run command: `documark convert ...`
2. With file: (attach or describe the file)
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include full error output:

```
paste error here
```

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Python version: (`python --version`)
- DocUmark version: (`documark --version`)
- Input file format: (e.g. PDF, DOCX)

## Security Note

If this bug could be a security vulnerability (bypass of scanning, quarantine failure, etc.),
please report it privately via [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead of this public issue.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or sample files that help explain the problem.
